description_long: This is a tall, slender vase with a flared rim and a rounded, stable base. The surface is predominantly a muted yellowish-brown, adorned with hand-painted dark blue floral motifs and green leaves that wind up the body. The paintwork appears slightly faded, giving the vase an antique or vintage character. The neck is elongated and gently curves outward at the top, while the body tapers inwards before widening again at the base. The finish is matte with subtle variations in color, suggesting age and artisanal craftsmanship. The vase is likely made of glass or ceramic, with a hollow interior suitable for holding flowers or decorative items.
description: A tall, slender vase with a flared rim, yellow-brown body, and faded blue floral motifs. The surface is matte and shows signs of age, giving it a vintage appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main floral motif with blue flowers and green leaves prominently displayed on the yellow-brown surface.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a less decorated area, with only partial floral patterns visible and more of the plain yellow-brown body exposed.
description_view_2: Opposite front view displays another section of the floral motif, similar to the front but with slight variation in the arrangement of flowers and leaves.
description_view_3: Rear view shows the least ornamentation, with mostly plain yellow-brown surface and only hints of the floral pattern wrapping around the side.
